query:
SELECT 
  v.nome,
  mt.metaTrimestral / 100 as meta_reais,
  mt.bonusMeta / 100 as bonus_meta,
  COALESCE(SUM(vd.vendas), 0) / 100 as vendido_reais,
  CASE 
    WHEN mt.metaTrimestral > 0 THEN ROUND((COALESCE(SUM(vd.vendas), 0) / mt.metaTrimestral) * 100, 2)
    ELSE 0 
  END as percentual_atingido
FROM vendedores v
LEFT JOIN metas_trimestrais mt ON v.id = mt.vendedorId AND mt.trimestre = 'Meta Trimestral 4'
LEFT JOIN vendas_diarias vd ON v.id = vd.vendedorId 
  AND vd.data >= '2025-09-01' 
  AND vd.data <= '2025-11-30'
WHERE v.role = 'user'
GROUP BY v.id, v.nome, mt.metaTrimestral, mt.bonusMeta
ORDER BY percentual_atingido DESC;
